title: Simple Threshold Alerting
description:
Each line is `timestamp\tvalue` (tab-separated). Return the starting timestamp of each run of 3 or more consecutive readings above 80.0, one per line.

Return an empty string if no alert windows are triggered.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: One alert window
